nasb.text: David took the shields of gold which were carried by the servants of Hadadezer and brought them to Jerusalem.

esv.text: And David took the shields of gold that were carried by the servants of Hadadezer and brought them to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 大衛奪取了哈大底謝臣僕所拿的金盾牌，帶回耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 大卫夺走哈大底谢侍从的金盾牌，带回耶路撒冷，
